task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Waterfront Estate in Naples FL (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $7250000.00 and wholesale is $5800000.00. Product features: 5-bedroom Mediterranean estate with private beach and boat dock. Reference: https://www.johnrwood.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Waterfront Estate in Naples FL. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Waterfront Estate in Naples FL. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
